UnitedStates.note: CQ 3/4/5 and ITU 6/7/8 set by state, not the call digit; ITU boundaries follow 110W and 90W meridians so some states straddle two ITU zones (value shown is predominant).

Canada.note: VE2 is CQ 5 south of the 50th parallel / CQ 2 north; VY0 is CQ 1 west of 102W / CQ 2 east.

Australia.note: CQ 29 = Western Zone (VK6, VK8); CQ 30 = Eastern Zone (VK1-5, VK7).
